allowCleartextPasswords.description: Allows using the cleartext client side plugin if required by an account.

authenticationType.description: The authentication method used to connect to the database.

connMaxLifetime.description: Maximum amount of time in seconds a connection may be reused.

connectionTimeout.description: The number of seconds to wait before aborting attempts to connect to the database.

enableSecureSocksProxy.description: Enables proxying the datasource connection through the secure socks proxy.

encrypt.description: Determines whether or how the connection to the server is encrypted.

maxIdleConns.description: Maximum number of idle connections in the connection pool.

maxOpenConns.description: Maximum number of open connections to the database.

secureSocksProxyUsername.description: Username used to authenticate with the secure socks proxy.

servername.description: Server name used to verify the hostname on the returned TLS certificate.

sslCertFile.description: Path to the PEM-encoded client certificate file used for TLS client authentication.

sslKeyFile.description: Path to the PEM-encoded client private key file used for TLS client authentication.

sslRootCertFile.description: Path to the PEM-encoded CA certificate file used to verify the server certificate.

sslmode.description: Determines whether and with what priority a secure SSL TCP/IP connection is negotiated with the server.

timeInterval.description: A lower limit for the auto group by time interval. Recommended to be set to write frequency, for example 1m if your data is written every minute.

timescaledb.description: Enables TimescaleDB-specific features and query support.

timezone.description: Specify the timezone used in the database session, such as Europe/Berlin or +02:00.

tlsConfigurationMethod.description: How the TLS certificates are configured: as file paths on disk or as file contents in secure JSON data.

tlsSkipVerify.description: When enabled, skips verification of the MySQL server's TLS certificate chain and host name.
